notes(not used):
*==Prerequisite fields Notes:==
*to initialise member,
due to bugs/design:(1) when update from compliance, sys upd only into mysql user columns. when update from merch, sys upd into both user & merchant columns. (2) when performing manual trigger(by compliance /merchant) ,no update will happen if member's existing BL/SG is of the same value.
   For all TC, always initialise with 100%,A. this is to ensure testcase really starts executing from fresh. if existing manual value(especially merch) is not clear, it might cause all hit before the last hit to yield diff result than the one u documented. Do below:
   1)TC WITHOUT merchUpd->initialise with complianceUpd 100%/A. 
   2)TC WITH merchUpd->initialise with MerchUpd 100%/A 1st, then ComplianceUpd(except BL/SG,cox they're already updated by merchant, it wont get updated anymore if existing is same value)
   3)for all ManualUpd(compl/merch) in TC, MAKE SURE VALUE TO UPDATE IS DIFF FROM EXISTING ONE,else no update will happen(my py will throw warning for this). in case same, add 1 more update in front with different value.
*to save time on initialization, only use gbmock_txxxMERxxx for TC with merchValue(i.egbmock_t3442mer#). so only few members need merchant update.
